MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Yulissa Zulaica for Kathleen McDonagh (Respondent)
Connie Yi for William McDonagh (Petitioner)

Counsel reported that an accounting has been provided, not filed, parties have reached a tentative settlement, and request 30 day continuance. The Petition to compel trustee to account, etc., is continued to May 14, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le, Leslie Gomez. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
